name: Aplex Technology Inc.
summary: Aplex Technology Inc. develops, manufactures, and sells industrial PC products worldwide. The company provides stainless steel panel, industrial panel, embedded box, marine panel, in-vehicle panel, and ATEx panel PC products. It also offers human-machine interfaces, ATEx displays, ATEx box pc products, industrial displays and boards, and machine vision systems, as well as accessories, including storage products, power adapters and modules, converter boards, and product stands. The company provides its products for use in smart factory, surveillance, control and communication, machine vision, food and beverage automation, kiosk and ticketing, ATEX oil and gas, smart warehousing and transportation, and healthcare applications. Aplex Technology Inc. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
